premium_features_usage.long_form_posts: 1 per day minimum. Use for threads, case studies, tutorials.
premium_features_usage.edit_function: Fix typos within 30 mins. Don't abuse.
premium_features_usage.reply_boost: Engage on relevant threads. Replies rank higher.
premium_features_usage.grok: Use for content ideas, hashtag research, trend spotting.

hashtag_strategy.notes: X algorithm may penalize >3 hashtags. Quality > quantity.
